questions.prompt: How comfortable are you writing Python functions, loops, and dict comprehensions from scratch?
How comfortable are you with asyncio, coroutines, and the event loop?
How comfortable are you building REST APIs with FastAPI (routes, dependencies, Pydantic)?
How comfortable are you modeling data and writing async queries with SQLAlchemy 2.0?
How comfortable are you crafting system prompts, few-shot examples, and structured outputs?
How comfortable are you calling the Claude Messages API (streaming, tool use, caching)?
How comfortable are you building a retrieve-augment-generate pipeline end to end?
How comfortable are you designing multi-step agents with planning, memory, and tools?
How comfortable are you setting up golden sets and LLM-as-judge evaluations?
How comfortable are you building Next.js App Router pages with server/client components?
